narrative:
Bowling Green 4-D (precinct in Wood County) has 1,138 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
